title: Senior Teacher - Great Learning - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Great Learning - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!
